label: Health & Beauty
description: Industry archetype for cosmetics, skincare, haircare, personal care, and wellness products. Includes product types for beauty, body care, and supplements with regulatory attributes for ingredient lists (INCI), allergen declarations, cruelty-free and vegan certifications, SPF ratings, and shelf-life tracking.

attribute_groups.description: Product formulation details: ingredients (INCI), active compounds, concentration, and texture
Target skin type, hair type, skin concern, and suitability profiles
Allergen declarations, safety warnings, FDA/EU compliance, and dermatological testing
Cruelty-free, vegan, organic, clean beauty, and sustainability certifications
Expiration tracking, PAO (period after opening), batch numbers, and storage conditions

attribute_types.validation_message: SPF must be a number between 0 and 100
Value must be a percentage between 0 and 100

attributes.description: Full INCI (International Nomenclature of Cosmetic Ingredients) ingredient list as required by EU/FDA regulations
Highlighted active ingredients (e.g., Retinol 0.5%, Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide 10%)

attributes.options: Cream, Gel, Serum, Oil, Lotion, Balm, Mousse, Spray, Powder, Stick, Liquid, Foam, Paste, Wax, Sheet Mask, Capsule, Tablet
attributes.description: Physical form or texture of the product
Net volume or weight (e.g., 50 ml, 100 g, 1.7 fl oz)

attributes.options: All Skin Types, Normal, Dry, Oily, Combination, Sensitive, Mature, Acne-Prone
attributes.description: Target skin type suitability

attributes.options: Anti-Aging, Hydration, Acne, Brightening, Dark Spots, Redness, Pores, Fine Lines, Sun Protection, Firming, Exfoliation, General Care
attributes.description: Primary skin concern the product addresses

attributes.options: All Hair Types, Straight, Wavy, Curly, Coily, Fine, Thick, Normal, Oily, Dry, Color-Treated, Damaged
attributes.description: Target hair type suitability (for haircare products)

attributes.options: SPF 15, SPF 20, SPF 30, SPF 50, SPF 50+, N/A
attributes.description: Sun protection factor rating if applicable

attributes.options: Fragrance-Free, Unscented, Light Floral, Rose, Citrus, Herbal, Woody, Fresh, Vanilla, Coconut, Lavender, Custom Blend
attributes.description: Fragrance profile or scent family
Declared allergens as required by EU Cosmetics Regulation (EC) No 1223/2009
Mandatory safety warnings and usage precautions
Whether the product has been dermatologically tested

attributes.options: Yes - Leaping Bunny, Yes - PETA, Yes - Other, No, Pending
attributes.description: Cruelty-free certification status and certifying body

attributes.options: Yes - Certified, Yes - Self-Declared, No, Pending
attributes.description: Vegan status - contains no animal-derived ingredients

attributes.options: COSMOS Organic, COSMOS Natural, USDA Organic, Ecocert, Soil Association, NATRUE, None
attributes.description: Organic certification body and standard

attributes.options: Yes - Free from Parabens/Sulfates/Phthalates, Yes - EWG Verified, Yes - Custom Standard, No
attributes.description: Clean beauty standard compliance (free from harmful chemicals)

attributes.options: Fully Recyclable, Partially Recyclable, Refillable, Biodegradable, Not Recyclable
attributes.description: Packaging recyclability and sustainability
Total shelf life in months from date of manufacture
Period after opening (PAO) symbol duration - how long product is safe after first use

attributes.options: Room Temperature, Cool & Dry, Refrigerated, Avoid Direct Sunlight, Below 25°C, Below 30°C
attributes.description: Recommended storage conditions for the product
Color shade or variant name (e.g., Rose Nude, Fair Ivory, Deep Espresso) for makeup products
Target demographic for the product

attributes.options: Face, Eyes, Lips, Body, Hands, Feet, Hair, Scalp, Nails, Full Body
attributes.description: Primary area of application

attributes.options: Daily, Twice Daily, Weekly, 2-3 Times per Week, As Needed, One-Time Use
attributes.description: Recommended usage frequency

product_types.description: Facial and body skincare products including moisturizers, serums, cleansers, and treatments. Supports Shade/Volume variant axes.
Color cosmetics including foundation, lipstick, eyeshadow, mascara, and blush. Supports Shade variant axes with extensive color ranges.
Shampoos, conditioners, treatments, and styling products. Supports Volume/Type variant axes.
Perfumes, eau de toilette, body mists, and scented products. Supports Volume variant axes.
Body wash, deodorant, oral care, and everyday personal hygiene products. Some support Volume variants.
Dietary supplements, vitamins, and wellness products. Requires additional regulatory attributes for claims and dosage.

quality_rules.message: Cosmetic products must have a complete INCI ingredient list
quality_rules.description: INCI ingredient listing is legally required by EU Cosmetics Regulation (EC) 1223/2009 and FDA regulations

quality_rules.message: Products must specify their physical form (cream, gel, serum, etc.)
quality_rules.description: Product form is essential for customer understanding and proper product categorization

quality_rules.message: Products must specify net volume or weight
quality_rules.description: Net quantity declaration is legally required on all cosmetic and personal care packaging

quality_rules.message: Skincare products should specify the target skin type
quality_rules.description: Skin type information helps customers find suitable products and reduces returns

quality_rules.message: Products should declare cruelty-free status for transparent marketing
quality_rules.description: Cruelty-free information is increasingly important for consumer purchasing decisions

quality_rules.message: Products should include allergen declarations for customer safety
quality_rules.description: Allergen labeling is required under EU Cosmetics Regulation for 26 known allergens

quality_rules.message: Products should specify period after opening (PAO) for customer guidance
quality_rules.description: PAO symbol is required on EU cosmetic products with shelf life exceeding 30 months

quality_rules.message: Makeup products should specify the shade or color name
quality_rules.description: Shade information is critical for color cosmetics variant management and customer selection

quality_rules.message: Beauty products should have at least 2 images (product and texture/swatch)
quality_rules.description: Product and swatch imagery helps customers evaluate color, texture, and packaging

quality_rules.message: INCI list should be comprehensive with proper nomenclature
quality_rules.description: Complete INCI listings ensure regulatory compliance and enable allergen checking

demo_products.description: Lightweight vitamin C serum with 15% L-Ascorbic Acid and Hyaluronic Acid for radiant, even-toned skin. Clinically proven to reduce dark spots in 4 weeks.

attributes.inci_ingredients: Aqua, Ascorbic Acid, Propanediol, Glycerin, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Ferulic Acid, Panthenol, Sodium Hydroxide, Citric Acid, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin
attributes.key_actives: 15% L-Ascorbic Acid, Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin E, Ferulic Acid

demo_products.description: Long-wearing matte lipstick with creamy, comfortable formula. Enriched with jojoba oil for hydration without compromising the matte finish.

attributes.inci_ingredients: Isononyl Isononanoate, Dimethicone, Silica, Trimethylsiloxysilicate, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Candelilla Cera, Tocopheryl Acetate, CI 77891, CI 15850, CI 77491

demo_products.description: Sulfate-free hydrating shampoo enriched with argan oil and keratin. Gently cleanses while restoring moisture and shine to dry, damaged hair.

attributes.inci_ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Panthenol, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Parfum

demo_products.description: Lightweight mineral sunscreen with zinc oxide and titanium dioxide. Leaves no white cast and provides broad-spectrum UVA/UVB protection.

attributes.inci_ingredients: Aqua, Zinc Oxide, Titanium Dioxide, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Glycerin, Butyloctyl Salicylate, Dimethicone, Niacinamide, Tocopherol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Silica, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin
attributes.key_actives: Zinc Oxide 15%, Titanium Dioxide 5%, Niacinamide, Vitamin E

demo_products.description: Elegant floral eau de parfum with top notes of bergamot and peony, heart of jasmine and rose, and a warm base of musk and sandalwood.

attributes.inci_ingredients: Alcohol Denat., Parfum, Aqua, Limonene, Linalool, Geraniol, Citronellol, Hydroxycitronellal, Benzyl Salicylate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone
attributes.allergen_declaration: Contains: Limonene, Linalool, Geraniol, Citronellol, Hydroxycitronellal, Benzyl Salicylate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone
